understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` by navigating through each level. The player must avoid hazards and use clicks strategically to clear paths, all while managing a limited number of turns and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity takes over until the player lands on a solid tile, hits a spike, or reaches the goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks (x) at specified coordinates without moving the player or advancing any platform timer. Spikes (u/v) cause immediate failure. The player has 50 turns per attempt and 2 attempts per level. Fall destinations for each move are previewed in the structured state. Passages (landings at different y-levels) are important for progressing. UNDO reverts the last action.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` by navigating through each level. The player must avoid hazards and use clicks strategically to clear paths, all while managing a limited number of turns and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity takes over until the player lands on a solid tile, hits a spike, or reaches the goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks (x) at specified coordinates without moving the player or advancing any platform timer. Spikes (u/v) cause immediate failure. The player has 50 turns per attempt and 2 attempts per level. Fall destinations for each move are previewed in the structured state. Passages (landings at different y-levels) are important for progressing. UNDO reverts the last action.
